name: Sundried Tomato and Pesto Torte
recipeIngredient: 10 sun-dried tomatoes, soaked in warm water
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the herbs, garlic, salt, and pepper in a small food processor until finely chopped.
2. Add the walnuts, half of the cheese, and process again to combine.
3. Incorporate 2 tablespoons of softened butter into the mixture and process to blend well.
4. Place the mixture halfway into the lined mold and chill.
5. Squeeze out excess water from the tomatoes and process them with the enchovies until a paste forms.
6. Add the tomato paste, remaining cheese, salt (if needed), and pepper to the processed herb mixture. Blend well.
7. Spoon the tomato mixture onto top of the basil mixture in the mold and chill for at least 3 hours.
8. Unmold from the film and serve with crackers.
